name: A.B.P. NOCIVELLI
rationale: A.B.P. NOCIVELLI displays classic value characteristics including a debt-free balance sheet, a strong 15% ROE, and double-digit profit margins that suggest a durable operational moat. With a forward P/E of 12.9 relative to 27% revenue growth, the stock is significantly undervalued, providing the necessary margin of safety and runway for a $200M market cap company to scale 10x over a decade.
